headline: McDonald’s revamps menu across 17 items as GLP-1 use surges
summary: Protein is having a moment. The rise of people using GLP-1 drugs to lose weight, along with the overall changing consumer demands, has left restaurants scrambling to deliver protein-heavy menu options.
